name: Practical Life
description: Activities that develop coordination, concentration, independence, and order through real-life tasks

categories.name: Preliminary Exercises
categories.description: Foundation movements that prepare for all other practical life work

works.name: Carrying a Mat
works.description: Learning to carry, unroll, and roll a work mat properly
works.controlOfError: Mat drags on floor or unrolls

levels.name: Basic Mat Carrying
levels.description: Carry mat horizontally with both hands

levels.name: Unrolling and Rolling
levels.description: Properly unroll and roll up mat

works.name: Carrying a Chair
works.description: Learning to lift, carry, and place a chair quietly
works.controlOfError: Chair makes noise or hits objects

levels.name: Lifting Chair
levels.description: Lift chair by back and seat

works.name: Carrying a Tray
works.description: Carrying a tray with objects balanced and stable

levels.name: Empty Tray
levels.description: Carry empty tray with proper grip

levels.name: Tray with Fragile Objects
levels.description: Carry tray with glass or breakable items

works.name: Carrying a Table
works.description: Two children carrying a table together

works.name: Walking on the Line
works.description: Walking carefully on a line marked on the floor

levels.name: Walking with Water
levels.description: Carry glass of water without spilling

works.name: Sitting and Standing at a Table
works.description: Proper way to sit down and stand up

works.name: The Silence Game
works.description: Group activity to practice being completely still and silent

levels.name: Extended Silence
levels.description: Longer periods, listen for subtle sounds

levels.name: Basic Page Turning
levels.description: Turn pages one at a time

works.name: Opening and Closing Containers
works.description: Various containers with different closures: screw tops, snap lids, cork bottles, latched boxes

works.name: Nuts and Bolts Board
works.description: Screwing and unscrewing nuts onto bolts of different sizes
materials: Bolt board with different sized bolts
works.controlOfError: Nut does not fit on wrong bolt

levels.name: Mixed Sizes
levels.description: Match correct nut to correct bolt by size

categories.name: Transfer Activities
categories.description: Moving materials from one container to another using various tools

works.name: Dry Transfer - Hands
materials: Large objects (cotton balls, pompoms, wooden eggs)

levels.name: Large Objects
levels.description: Transfer large cotton balls or pompoms

works.name: Basting (Turkey Baster)
works.description: Using a baster to transfer water

works.name: Eye Dropper
works.description: Using eye dropper for precise transfer

works.name: Stirring
works.description: Mixing liquids or dry materials with controlled circular motions

levels.name: Dry Stirring
levels.description: Stir dry materials like rice in a bowl

levels.name: Wet Stirring
levels.description: Stir water with a spoon without splashing

works.name: Hammering
works.description: Using a wooden mallet to tap pegs or tees into a soft surface

levels.name: Cork Board
levels.description: Tap golf tees into cork board

categories.name: Dressing Frames
categories.description: Frames that isolate different fastening skills for independence in dressing

works.name: Braiding Frame
materials: Braiding frame with ribbons or rope

works.name: Covering Coughs and Sneezes
works.chineseName: 蒙特梭利咳嗽喷嚏礼仪

categories.name: Care of Environment
categories.description: Activities for maintaining the classroom and home environment

works.name: Mopping
works.description: Using a mop to clean floors
works.controlOfError: Floor not clean or too wet

works.name: Ironing
works.description: Using a low-heat iron to press small cloth items like napkins

levels.name: Demonstration
levels.description: Watch teacher iron, learn safety rules

categories.name: Grace and Courtesy
categories.description: Social skills, manners, and respectful interaction

levels.name: Introducing Others
levels.description: Introduce two people to each other

works.name: Saying Excuse Me
works.description: When and how to say excuse me

works.name: Offering and Accepting Help
works.description: How to offer and receive assistance

works.name: Observing Another's Work
works.description: How to watch others work respectfully
works.chineseName: 蒙特梭利观察他人工作

levels.name: Waiting for a Turn
levels.description: Wait for material to be available

categories.name: Food Preparation
categories.description: Preparing food for oneself and others

works.name: Spreading
works.description: Spreading butter, jam, or other spreads

works.name: Peeling - With Peeler
works.controlOfError: Peel remains or too much removed

works.name: Mixing and Stirring Food
works.description: Mixing ingredients for simple recipes — batter, dough, salad

levels.name: Dry to Wet
levels.description: Add dry ingredients to wet and mix

categories.name: Sewing and Needlework
categories.description: Fine motor activities through sewing and threading
